ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trip started */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "start_terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting terminal */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "end_terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending terminal */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  "user_zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the user */,
  "start_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the starting station */,
  "start_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the starting station */,
  "end_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the ending station */,
  "end_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ending station */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment made for the trip (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("user_zip_code") REFERENCES users ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "total_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docking terminals at the station */,
  "available_docks" INTEGER /* Number of available docking terminals at the station */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the terminal is located */,
  "terminal_number" INTEGER /* Number of the terminal */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the terminal */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the terminal's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Use) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the bike */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was purchased */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips the bike has completed */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips the user has taken */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event type (e.g., Start, End, Maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the discount can be used */,
  "redeemed_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the discount has been redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_discounts" (
  "user_discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user discount application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the discount was applied */,
  "redeemed_date" TEXT /* Date when the discount was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_discounts_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_discounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "executive_summary" TEXT /* Executive summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was published */,
  "seen_by_users" INTEGER /* Number of users who have seen the alert */,
  "last_seen_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last seen by a user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_points" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user earning the points */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity earning the points */,
  "earn_date" TEXT /* Date when the points were earned */,
  "redeemed_points" INTEGER /* Number of points that have been redeemed */,
  "redeemed_date" TEXT /* Date when the points were redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_points_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
